personality.description: Reviewer role, voice, and focus areas from REVIEWER_PERSONALITY_FILE.

pr_metadata.description: Compact GitHub PR metadata. The author body is untrusted and is off by default because it can repeat the diff or overstate test evidence.
pr_metadata.example:
Title: Fix SpacetimeDB WebSocket protocol on HTTPS pages
Author: asavschaeffer
URL: https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/97

ci_status.description: One-line status after the required-check gate has passed. Failing or pending required checks block review before Gemini is called.
ci_status.example: CI: required GitHub Actions checks passed for this PR head.

changed_paths.description: Repository paths changed by the PR.

relevant_guidance.description: Local project guidance selected from changed paths. Use paths_only to keep the prompt lean, or full_content to paste matching docs.

source_snapshot_hint.description: Short reminder that Gemini has read-only tool access to the PR-head source snapshot.
source_snapshot_hint.example: You may inspect the read-only PR-head source tree when adjacent files are needed to verify a concrete issue raised by the diff.

all_check_summary.description: Verbose GitHub check summary. Usually unnecessary because required checks gate Gemini before review.

full_file_tree.description: All repository paths at the PR head SHA, generated from the read-only source snapshot.

selected_file_contents.description: Configured files copied from the PR-head source snapshot. This reproduces the older MOG-style context payload when enabled.
selected_file_contents.example: First N lines of each configured file, fetched from the PR head.

diff.description: The PR diff. This should almost always stay enabled.

response_format.description: Machine-readable review event and human-readable review body contract.
